---
name: Reference Request
about: Submit a source reference for priority addition to the knowledge base.
title: "[REFERENCE]"
labels: reference
assignees: ''

---

Priority reference submissions are added to the knowledge base as soon as possible, no questions asked. If the source checks out it will be added, and if it already exists in the pending database it will be pulled forward for immediate inclusion.

---

**Knowledge Base Location**
Where in the repo should this reference appear? 
(Identified by the section heading or content subheading, alternatively a screenshot is perfect)


---

**Original Contributor**
Name or username of the original author. Include a profile link if known.


---

**Platform**
Website or forum the source is hosted on. 
(E.g. `PCMHacking.net`)


---

**Post Date**
DD/MM/YYYY


---

**Direct Link**
[Insert URL]

---

**Notes**
Brief description of what the source covers and why it's relevant.
